summary: Excellent audience recording of a rare, tight and jam‑filled show highlighted by a standout Lovelight.
review: Fans rave about the fun, compact yet improvisational vibe of this performance, calling it a “house‑party” feel with strong jams throughout. The audience tape is praised as the best‑sounding of the four available sources, though one reviewer notes a lower‑generation tape sounds clearer. Overall the show and its capture are regarded very positively.

ai_rating.rationale: Three unanimous 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and recording quality, with only a single 3‑star comment noting clarity issues; weighted toward show quality (70%) yields a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape described as very good and the best sounding of four available versions, though another lower‑gen tape is said to be clearer.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fun, tight and compact performance that kept the energy high and encouraged jammed improvisations throughout.
